name: io.qent.broxy/google-workspace
title: Google Workspace
description: Google Workspace MCP server for Gmail, Calendar, Drive, Docs, Sheets, and related Google tools.

packageArguments.name: --tool-tier
packageArguments.description: Tool tier to load (core, extended, complete).

environmentVariables.name: GOOGLE_OAUTH_CLIENT_ID
environmentVariables.description: Google OAuth Client ID for workspace-mcp.

environmentVariables.name: GOOGLE_OAUTH_CLIENT_SECRET
environmentVariables.description: Google OAuth Client Secret for workspace-mcp.

environmentVariables.name: USER_GOOGLE_EMAIL
environmentVariables.description: Optional default Google account email used by legacy OAuth 2.0 tools.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_ENABLE_OAUTH21
environmentVariables.description: Enable OAuth 2.1 mode. Keep false for stdio + start_google_auth flow.

environmentVariables.name: OAUTHLIB_INSECURE_TRANSPORT
environmentVariables.description: Allow localhost HTTP callback for legacy OAuth 2.0 flow.

environmentVariables.name: WORKSPACE_MCP_PORT
environmentVariables.description: Local callback/server port used by workspace-mcp.

install_steps: Open [Resource manager](https://console.cloud.google.com/cloud-resource-manager) from **Google Cloud console** and click [Create project](https://console.cloud.google.com/projectcreate).
Choose a project name, for example *Google Workspace MCP*, and click **Create**. After creating the project, **Resource manager** will open again.

Open [Project configuration](https://console.cloud.google.com/auth/overview/create) and make sure the project created in the previous step is selected in the top dropdown to the right of **Google Cloud**.
Fill **App name**, **User support email**, **Audience: External**, and **Contact Information**. At the end click **Create**.

Open [Create OAuth client ID](https://console.cloud.google.com/auth/clients/create) and select **Desktop app** in **Application type**. Choose a client name, for example **Broxy**, then click **Create**.
In the **OAuth client created** popup, copy **Client ID** to [GOOGLE_OAUTH_CLIENT_ID].

Enable required services in [API Library](https://console.cloud.google.com/apis/library): [Gmail](https://console.cloud.google.com/apis/library/gmail.googleapis.com), [Google Sheets](https://console.cloud.google.com/apis/library/sheets.googleapis.com), [Google Calendar](https://console.cloud.google.com/apis/library/calendar-json.googleapis.com), and others.
